title: HedHog Table YAML
description: Schema for hedhog/table/{tableName}.yaml files. The file name (without extension) is the PostgreSQL table name.

columns.description: Ordered list of column definitions for this table.

TableColumn.description: A single column definition. Use the 'type' discriminator to select the correct column shape.

PkColumn.title: Primary Key Column
PkColumn.description: Auto-generates: id SERIAL NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY. The 'name' is always forced to 'id'.

type.description: Marks this as the primary key column.

name.description: Ignored — always set to 'id' by the CLI.

isPrimaryKey.description: Redundant when type is 'pk'. Always true.

isNullable.description: Redundant when type is 'pk'. Always false.

FkColumn.title: Foreign Key Column
FkColumn.description: Creates: <name> INTEGER NOT NULL + ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT FOREIGN KEY.

isNullable.description: Set to true to allow NULL (optional FK).

isUnique.description: Set to true to add a UNIQUE INDEX on the FK column.

SlugColumn.title: Slug Column
SlugColumn.description: Auto-generates: slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE. Name is always forced to 'slug'.

name.description: Ignored — always set to 'slug' by the CLI.

OrderColumn.title: Order Column
OrderColumn.description: Auto-generates: order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Name is always forced to 'order'.

name.description: Ignored — always set to 'order' by the CLI.

CreatedAtColumn.title: Created At Timestamp Column
CreatedAtColumn.description: Auto-generates: created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(). Name is always forced to 'created_at'.

name.description: Ignored — always set to 'created_at' by the CLI.

UpdatedAtColumn.title: Updated At Timestamp Column
UpdatedAtColumn.description: Auto-generates: updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), plus a trg_touch_updated_at trigger to auto-update the value on every UPDATE. Name is always forced to 'updated_at'.

name.description: Ignored — always set to 'updated_at' by the CLI.

LocaleVarcharColumn.title: Locale VARCHAR Column
LocaleVarcharColumn.description: A translatable VARCHAR column. NOT placed in the main table — instead it is routed to the auto-generated <tableName>_locale companion table.

length.description: VARCHAR length for this locale column. Defaults to 255.

LocaleTextColumn.title: Locale TEXT Column
LocaleTextColumn.description: A translatable TEXT column. NOT placed in the main table — instead it is routed to the auto-generated <tableName>_locale companion table.

EnumColumn.title: Enum Column
EnumColumn.description: Creates a PostgreSQL custom ENUM type named <tableName>_<columnName>_enum and uses it as the column type. Either 'enum' or 'values' must be provided.

enum.description: List of allowed enum string values.

values.description: Alias for 'enum'. Use either 'enum' or 'values', not both.

default.description: Default enum value. Must be one of the values listed in 'enum'/'values'.

NativeColumn.title: Native PostgreSQL Column
NativeColumn.description: A column using a native PostgreSQL type (e.g. VARCHAR, TEXT, INTEGER, JSONB, UUID) or a short alias (int, datetime, char, bytes). Any type not matching a special alias will be validated against the list of known PostgreSQL types.

type.description: Native PostgreSQL type or short alias. Must not be a special alias (pk, fk, slug, order, created_at, updated_at, locale_varchar, locale_text, enum).

isNullable.description: Allow NULL. When omitted, defaults to NOT NULL.

isUnique.description: Create a UNIQUE INDEX on this column.

isPrimaryKey.description: Mark this column as PRIMARY KEY. Prefer 'type: pk' for new tables.

default.description: DEFAULT value. For TIMESTAMPTZ columns use the string "now()".

length.description: Character length for VARCHAR and CHAR columns. If omitted, CHAR defaults to 1.

FkReferences.title: FK References
FkReferences.description: Defines the target of a foreign key constraint.

onDelete.description: Referential action when the referenced row is deleted.

onUpdate.description: Referential action when the referenced column value is updated.
